sourceMovie.title: Anyone But You
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Anyone But You works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Amélie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Anyone But You clicked for you, Amélie (2001) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Anyone But You?
faq.answer: Try Amélie, Pretty Woman, 10 Things I Hate About You—each shares DNA with Anyone But You while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Anyone But You?
faq.answer: Anyone But You (2023) is best described as Romance, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Anyone But You worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
